message:
fix: revert DbConn to SqliteConnection, fix test races and SQL syntax

FrankenConnection (pure-Rust SQLite) lacks CREATE TRIGGER, sqlite_master,
and backup_to_path support needed by CLI and share crates. Reverted
DbConn type alias back to SqliteConnection. Changed all executable
BEGIN CONCURRENT to BEGIN IMMEDIATE (standard SQLite WAL write locking).
Added GLOBAL_SAMPLE_LOCK mutex to KPI tests that share global sample
buffer, preventing parallel test races.

4239 tests passing, 0 failures, 0 clippy warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
